name: the Time Traveller
descriptors: his coat was dusty and dirty, and smeared with green down the sleeves
his hair disordered, and as it seemed greyer
his chin had a brown cut on it—a cut half-healed
his expression was haggard and drawn, as by intense suffering
he walked with just such a limp as I have seen in footsore tramps
a pair of tattered, blood-stained socks
the ghost of his old smile flickered across his face
